channel.title: Adiutor Update
channel.description: Most recent changes with links to updates.

item.title: Version 1.3.0
item.description:
What's New in v1.3.0

✨ Changes & Improvements

  • Introducing the all-new in-app Journal: Capture thoughts, reflections, and study notes directly within Adiutor. Your entries remain fully on-device, designed with privacy at the core and no external data exposure.

‼️ Bug Fixes

  • Includes multiple bug fixes, stability enhancements, and under-the-hood improvements for a smoother experience.

Feedback

Feedback, bug reports, and suggestions are welcome through GitHub Issues.

Thank you for trying Adiutor.
